headline: Is Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific might already be on your watchlist, but the real question is whether the current share price around US$474 reflects what you are actually getting for your money. Recent share price moves have been mixed, with the stock up 2.2% over the last week, while the 30 day return is a 7.2% decline and the year to date return sits at a 19.9% decline, contributing to a 1 year return of an 8.0% decline and a 3 year return of a 14.2% decline. These returns sit against an ongoing...
